nodes.name: Cassin's finch
nodes.summary: Cassin's finch（Cassin's finch，学名 Haemorhous cassinii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The species was downlisted from Near Threatened in 2019 since the population declines seem to have slowed down. Some present and future threats to this species include logging, fire and fire suppression, invasive species, disease, and droughts
